rationale: Educ. Code §49.051 governs school district consolidation agreements and local revenue levels under §48.257. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct conflict exists.
quote: The agreement is not effective unless the commissioner certifies that the consolidated district, as a result of actions taken under this chapter, will have a local revenue level equal to or less than the level established under Section 48.257.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on local revenue levels is possible but not addressed by this rule's operative language.
